buttons.primary: bg-indigo-600 hover:bg-indigo-700 text-white rounded-full px-8 py-4 font-semibold text-lg transition-all hover:scale-105 hover:shadow-[0_0_20px_-5px_rgba(79,70,229,0.5)]
buttons.secondary: bg-white/5 hover:bg-white/10 text-white border border-white/10 rounded-full px-6 py-3 font-medium backdrop-blur-sm transition-all

cards.feature: group relative overflow-hidden rounded-2xl border border-white/5 bg-white/5 p-8 transition-all hover:border-white/10 hover:bg-white/10
cards.pricing: flex flex-col rounded-3xl border border-white/10 bg-slate-900/50 p-8 backdrop-blur-xl

navigation.style: fixed top-0 left-0 right-0 z-50 border-b border-white/5 bg-slate-950/80 backdrop-blur-xl supports-[backdrop-filter]:bg-slate-950/60

visual_enhancers.textures: Use subtle noise overlay on background if possible for film grain effect

images.usage: Hero section background fallback if video fails

sections_structure.name: Hero
elements: H1: Turn stories into cinematic videos using AI
Sub: The world's most advanced Story-to-Video engine. Create award-winning content in seconds.
Visual: Large video player container with 'glow' effect behind it

sections_structure.name: Showcase Gallery
sections_structure.content: Mix of 36+ generated videos (use placeholders from R2 if available or fallback images)

instructions_to_main_agent: 2. THEME: Ensure 'dark' class is applied to the html/body tag permanently for this landing page.
3. NAVBAR: Make it sticky with a glassmorphism effect (backdrop-blur-xl).
4. HERO VIDEO: If R2 video URL is not provided, use a div with a 'Play' icon and the 'Hero BG' image as a poster.
5. GRID: Use the 'Bento Grid' layout for the Gallery section as defined in the layout_strategy.
6. GRADIENTS: strictly AVOID purple/violet/fuchsia gradients. Use Indigo (#4f46e5) mixed with Slate (#020617) only.
7. COMPONENTS: Reuse Shadcn Button and Card but override styles to match the 'dark cinematic' aesthetic (rounded-full for buttons, glass for cards).
8. TESTING: Add data-testid to all buttons and inputs.
9. MOBILE: Ensure the Hero text is legible on mobile (text-4xl) and video doesn't overflow.
universal_guidelines: Do not use generic centered layouts everywhere.
Use 2-3x more spacing than typical (py-24 or py-32 for sections).
Micro-animations on hover are mandatory for all interactive elements.
Ensure text contrast meets WCAG AA standards (light gray text on dark bg).
